description: Trigger suite for the projection-sync skill.

cases.prompt: Sync the canonical verification result to the GitHub PR checks and issue labels.

sync_intent_present.check: Returns a sync plan or payload intent.

cases.prompt: Link this verification report and handoff bundle to the issue so reviewers can find them.

routes_to_adjacent_workflow_when_needed.check: Routes to artifact linking rather than claiming a broader projection sync.
